metadata.creator: The People of Vermont
metadata.description: This item contains bulk access to the Official Vermont Statutes as well as other edicts, such as court rules and attorney general opinions. The code is released quarterly. Please see the download link to browse individual items in each release.
metadata.rights: The Vermont Statutes Annotated is an EDICT OF GOVERNMENT and thus is in the Public Domain. No Rights Reserved.
metadata.subject: Vermont
metadata.title: Vermont Statutes Annotated (Bulk Access)
